issues.title: Hazardous Deep Pothole near MG Road Metro
issues.description: Large deep pothole right after the road curve on MG Road. Several two-wheelers have lost balance and damaged their tires trying to swerve. It is highly dangerous during monsoon rain water logging.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: BBMP Road Maintenance Cell should dispatch a rapid response asphalt repair truck for cold-mix filling immediately. Place warning boards 50m ahead of the curve.

comments.author: kambleganesh775
comments.text: Hit this pothole while riding home yesterday! Nearly lost balance on my bike. Please drive extremely slow near Cubbon Park curve.

comments.author: CivicLead
comments.text: I added temporary warning barricades with red reflective ribbons this afternoon so two-wheelers can spot it.

issues.title: Major Drinking Water Leak near Indiranagar
issues.description: BWSSB underground water main line has ruptured, causing clean drinking water to gush out of cracked pavement. It is flooding the sidewalk, causing pedestrians to walk on the busy 100 Feet road.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: BWSSB engineers need to isolate Gate Valve #12. Excavation is required to replace the broken PVC conduit with a heavy-duty ductile iron collar.

comments.author: kambleganesh775
comments.text: Spoke to the local BWSSB sub-division engineer, they stated a team is on the way to initiate excavation.

issues.title: Broken Streetlights near Majestic Transit Hub
issues.description: BESCOM streetlights along this crowded pedestrian path have been pitch black for over a week. Extreme safety risk for commuters returning late from the metro and train station.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: BESCOM field crew to replace expired mercury bulb with energy-efficient 120W LED fixture. Inspect daylight photocell sensor wiring.

issues.title: Illegal Solid Waste Dumping near Ulsoor Lake
issues.description: Several tons of commercial solid plastic waste and construction debris have been dumped directly along the Ulsoor Lake promenade footpath. Emitting strong odor and degrading lake water quality.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: BBMP Sanitation cell dispatch of heavy garbage loader and dump truck. Install warning CCTV camera surveillance around the scenic lake wall.
issues.locationName: Kensington Road Promenade, Ulsoor Lake, Bengaluru

comments.author: EcoGuardian
comments.text: Cleanliness drive conducted by BBMP sanitation staff along with Lake Welfare volunteers! Path is clean now, and BBMP has added warning plaques.

issues.title: Waterlogging & Road Cavity near Marine Drive
issues.description: Heavy monsoon tide water has pooled near the promenade, creating a hidden 2-foot road cavity. Extremely hazardous for cars and walkers.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: BMC Road & Traffic Department must install reflective visual cones and deploy standard high-capacity pumping trucks to drain water, followed by immediate cold asphalt paving.

issues.title: Broken Street Lamps opposite CST Station
issues.description: Old sodium streetlights along the busy outer walkway are completely dark. Promotes anti-social behavior and creates severe pedestrian hazards for train commuters.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: BEST Electricity Board crew to inspect control boxes and replace high-pressure sodium bulbs with modern 150W LED fixtures immediately.
issues.locationName: Walkway opposite Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus (CST), Mumbai

issues.title: Fallen Overhead Power Cable near CP Circle
issues.description: High-voltage overhead cable has snapped and is hanging low over a metallic signpost near the outer circle. Direct risk of severe shock or electrocution during monsoons.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: NDMC/BSES rapid response electrical team must immediately isolate Grid Section 4. Replace the cracked overhead support insulator and retension the line safely.
issues.locationName: Radial Road 3, Outer Circle, Connaught Place, New Delhi

comments.author: EcoGuardian
comments.text: Sent warning to NDMC portal. Police have cordoned off this corner for safety.

issues.title: Clogged Stormwater Drain near India Gate Lawns
issues.description: Silt, plastic bottles, and organic tree debris have completely choked the main storm drain grates, causing water to pool 1 foot deep across the pedestrian pathway.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: Delhi Jal Board/MCD sanitation crews to deploy high-pressure jetting suction machines to clear subterranean plastic bottlenecks.
issues.locationName: India Gate Central Lawns Outer Path, New Delhi

issues.title: Sewage Line Overflow near Marina Beach
issues.description: Underground sewer trunk line has backed up, causing pungent dark sewage water to pool on the beach loop road. Ruining the pristine public space and posing a biological threat.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: CMWSSB drainage squad should deploy specialized super-sucker vacuum pumps to clear plastic and sludge blockages in Mainhole #104.

issues.title: Open Exposed Wire Junction Box in T. Nagar
issues.description: Main utility distribution box on the busy Usman road shopping footpath has its metal doors open. Wet weather and crowds make this extremely dangerous.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: TANGEDCO electrical inspectors to shut down localized feeder line, tape exposed copper joints, and lock/replace the cabinet doors with reinforced metal locks.
issues.locationName: Usman Road Footpath, T. Nagar, Chennai

issues.title: Sewerage Overflow outside Charminar Entrance
issues.description: Main sewer manhole is bubbling over, flooding the heritage walkway with foul-smelling waste. Severely impacting tourists and local street vendors.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: HMWSSB municipal rapid response teams must flush the main line with high-velocity water jetters to dissolve fatbergs.

issues.title: Defunct Smart LED Lights in HITEC City
issues.description: A consecutive string of 5 smart overhead LED street lamps has blacked out. Creating a pitch-dark, unsafe walking space on the high-intensity tech transit route.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: TSSPDCL field electricians to replace blown photodiode switches and reboot the localized smart-lighting gateway router.
issues.locationName: Mindspace Road, HITEC City Tech Corridor, Hyderabad

issues.title: Tram Line Pavement Cracking on College Street
issues.description: Bitumen surrounding the active tram tracks has broken away completely, leaving deep 5-inch trenches. Two-wheeler tires are getting caught, leading to slips and traffic congestion.
issues.aiSuggestedFix: KMC Civil Engineers & Kolkata Tramways joint dispatch to pour quick-setting structural cement mortar along the rail flanks and level the asphalt grade.
issues.locationName: Presidency University Junction, College Street, Kolkata

badges.name: Pothole Pioneer
badges.description: Reported first localized road infrastructure issue.

badges.name: Eco Guardian
badges.description: Resolved or reported 3 sanitation and park issues.
